message:
Add option to disable auto-shrink by focus rank

New GSettings boolean 'auto-shrink-enabled' (default: true). When off,
windows are only stamped when manually minimized — no automatic
shrinking based on focus rank. The focus rank threshold spinner hides
when auto-shrink is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,12 @@
 <schemalist>
   <schema id="org.gnome.shell.extensions.mutter-butter"
           path="/org/gnome/shell/extensions/mutter-butter/">
+    <key name="auto-shrink-enabled" type="b">
+      <default>true</default>
+      <summary>Auto-shrink by focus rank</summary>
+      <description>Automatically shrink windows that fall below the focus rank threshold</description>
+    </key>
+
     <key name="focus-rank-threshold" type="i">
       <default>3</default>
       <summary>Focus rank threshold</summary>
